workflow_defaults.business_consequence: If finance review lands after the cut-off, payment moves to the next business day.
workflow_defaults.trace_fixture_basis: Public-source-derived proof fixture based on official OpenAI Agents tracing and human approval patterns plus the MCP tools approval model.

attributes.agent.name: AP Agent
attributes.aag.action_summary: AP Agent classified the invoice as a high-value consulting payment requiring finance review.
attributes.aag.authority_subject: AP Agent may classify and prepare approval packets but cannot approve invoices above USD 5,000.
attributes.aag.headline: Agent classified the invoice into a controlled finance review lane
attributes.service.name: openai-agents-runtime

attributes.agent.name: AP Agent
attributes.mcp.tool.name: lookup_purchase_order
attributes.mcp.server.name: finance-erp-gateway
attributes.aag.action_summary: AP Agent called the MCP ERP gateway to verify the purchase order before recommending approval.
attributes.aag.authority_subject: AP Agent may retrieve supporting PO records through approved read-only finance tools.
attributes.aag.headline: Agent pulled PO evidence through an MCP finance system gateway
attributes.aag.why_it_mattered: The run touched an external finance system but stayed inside a read-only authority boundary.
attributes.service.name: openai-agents-runtime

attributes.agent.name: AP Agent
attributes.aag.action_summary: AP Agent prepared the approval packet with PO, amount, and payment cut-off context.
attributes.aag.authority_subject: AP Agent may prepare approval packets but cannot approve invoices above USD 5,000.
attributes.aag.why_it_mattered: The agent accelerated review preparation without crossing the final approval boundary.
attributes.service.name: openai-agents-runtime

attributes.aag.action_summary: Policy engine escalated the invoice because the amount exceeds delegated authority.
attributes.aag.policy_explanation: Invoice amount 12,750.00 exceeds the delegated approval threshold.
attributes.aag.recommended_next_action: Escalate to a finance approver before payment can proceed.
attributes.aag.headline: Policy gate escalated the trace-derived workflow
attributes.service.name: policy-engine

attributes.aag.action_summary: Finance Director approved the invoice after reviewing the evidence packet and payment risk.
attributes.aag.authority_subject: Finance Director holds final approval authority for invoices above the delegated agent threshold.
attributes.aag.human_decision_reason: Approved because the PO was valid and missing the cut-off would have delayed payment.
attributes.aag.decision_rationale: Approved because supporting ERP evidence was complete and delaying payment would have pushed the vendor into the next business day.
attributes.aag.headline: Finance Director resolved the review case and approved the invoice
attributes.service.name: finance-console
